title: Build LLM eval harness for delegation quality measurement per model and task type

checks.detail: contract.yaml + metadata.yaml + handler with EnumLlmEvalTaskType, ModelLlmEvalTask, ModelLlmEvalSample, LlmEvalRequest, LlmEvalResult, ProtocolLlmClient, FakeLlmClient, NodeLlmEvalHarness all created under src/omnimarket/nodes/node_llm_eval_harness/

checks.detail: tests/test_golden_chain_llm_eval_harness.py — 10/10 tests pass in 0.04s covering dry-run, substring scoring, code scoring, error path, summary rollup, task-type filter, max-tasks cap, multi-model, event bus wiring, and Protocol satisfaction

checks.name: mypy_strict_clean

checks.name: ruff_clean

checks.name: pr_ci_merged
checks.detail: PR #196 (omnimarket) — all CI gates green (lint, typecheck, test, contract-validation, naming, structure, stale TODO, standards, legacy compat, ecosystem, ONEX schema, pr-title) merged via merge queue at 2026-04-11T07:29:24Z

dogfood_verification.cli_smoke: python -m omnimarket.nodes.node_llm_eval_harness --models qwen3-coder-30b,deepseek-r1-14b --task-types classification --dry-run — returned valid JSON with status=clean, dry_run=true
dogfood_verification.protocol_di: FakeLlmClient structurally satisfies ProtocolLlmClient; real adapter to land in follow-up (router integration ticket under same epic OMN-7985)

notes: First cut establishes COMPUTE node skeleton with deterministic offline scoring (ruff/mypy for code_generation; substring match for classification/contract_yaml). Real LLM adapter wrapping LLM_CODER_URL / LLM_DEEPSEEK_R1_URL / frontier providers, DB projection to omnidash, and router integration (>=20 samples → replace seed_tokens_per_sec heuristics) are deferred to follow-ups within epic OMN-7985 per ticket requirements.
